violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has employees trained as Food Safety Managers. No person is registered with the RIDOH as a Certified Food Safety Manager. Establishment must register employee with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor under the racks in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No trained Food Safety Manager was present during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Chicken Fingers and French Fries were observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product was voluntarily Disposed of. Establishment made new product. New product was placed into hot hold unit maintaining food over 135DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The floor in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
